blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Built base queries from two different data sources using the Mixed data source
- Hid base queries from visualization so only the expression output is rendered
- Inspected data shape with `SELECT * FROM A` before writing a JOIN
- Wrote an INNER JOIN across two queries using RefIDs as SQL table names
- Used COALESCE to handle NULL values in a LEFT JOIN

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Write SQL expressions](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/query-transform-data/sql-expressions/) for CTEs, subqueries, and conditional logic
- [Create expression queries](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/panels-visualizations/query-transform-data/expression-queries/) for Math, Reduce, and Resample operations
- [Configure cross-source alerting](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/alerting-rules/create-grafana-managed-rule/) using expressions across data sources

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Combine data from multiple data sources](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/combine-multi-source-data/)
- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
